name: agent-skills
description: Finance research, design tools, and media analysis skills for Claude Code. Includes 8 Wall Street-style finance reports, an Excalidraw diagram generator, a frontend design system deconstructor, and a media ingestion/analysis pipeline.

plugins.name: goldman-sachs-stock-screener
plugins.description: Goldman Sachs-style stock screening report with investment profile questionnaire

plugins.name: morgan-stanley-dcf-valuation
plugins.description: Morgan Stanley-style DCF valuation deep dive for any stock

plugins.name: jpmorgan-earnings-breakdown
plugins.description: JPMorgan-style earnings preview with beat/miss history and trade recommendation

plugins.name: bridgewater-risk-analysis
plugins.description: Bridgewater All-Weather portfolio stress test and risk exposure analysis

plugins.name: blackrock-portfolio-model
plugins.description: BlackRock-style portfolio construction tailored to age, goals, and risk tolerance

plugins.name: citadel-technical-analysis
plugins.description: Citadel-style technical analysis with entry price, stop-loss, and profit target

plugins.name: harvard-dividend-strategy
plugins.description: Harvard endowment-style dividend portfolio for passive income targets

plugins.name: bain-competitive-analysis
plugins.description: Bain-style competitive moat analysis across all major companies in a sector

plugins.name: renaissance-pattern-finder
plugins.description: Renaissance-style quantitative pattern detection and statistical edge finder

plugins.name: mckinsey-macro-assessment
plugins.description: McKinsey-style macroeconomic impact assessment on portfolio holdings

plugins.name: frontend-deconstructor
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer any website's design system — colors, typography, components, animations

plugins.name: excalidraw-diagram-generator
plugins.description: Generate polished Excalidraw diagrams from data, markdown, or descriptions

plugins.name: ingest
plugins.description: Ingest and analyze content from any URL — YouTube, X, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, or any website

plugins.name: curate
plugins.description: Organize ingested content into a searchable Obsidian library with archetypes, hook analysis, and Dataview queries

plugins.name: fact-check
plugins.description: Evaluate accuracy and truthfulness of claims using a 5-dimension model — accuracy, context, source reliability, bias, and confidence

plugins.name: brand-voice
plugins.description: Extract your unique writing style into a reusable Voice DNA Profile — tone, vocabulary, patterns, and platform adaptations
